_provenance.extracted_by: in-session Claude Code sub-agent (no API call), 2026-06-27
_provenance.purpose: Real published paper end-to-end (Epic K): the main result of arXiv 2006.06138 (Lei & Candes, Conformal Inference of Counterfactuals and ITE) lifted from prose into a grounded dgroup, for multi-prior decomposition against the conformal-prediction theorems it builds on (retrieval/library/conformal_theorems.json). The residual after covering should be COUNTERFACTUAL + NESTED — the paper's genuine contribution over weighted conformal prediction.

target.name: arxiv-2006.06138-main
target.text: Under unconfoundedness, weighted split conformal prediction with weights given by the likelihood ratio between the test covariate distribution and the calibration distribution (the inverse propensity score) yields a prediction interval for the counterfactual outcome with valid marginal coverage at level 1 minus alpha; combined with a nested procedure this produces intervals for the individual treatment effect.

groundings.the_weights: weights given by the likelihood ratio
groundings.alpha_level: valid marginal coverage at level 1 minus alpha
